method: leakage-safe honest holdout: forward_stepwise_multi_base gate runs on TRAIN only (internal TimeSeriesSplit/KFold CV); joint-OLS composite target fit on TRAIN; LGBM trained on composite target; predictions inverted to y-scale and scored on a DISJOINT 40% holdout the gate never saw
verdict: RESOLVED: flip 0.02 -> 0.005. 0.005 wins 20/20 non-tied seeds on additive multi-base DGPs (~16-19% honest-holdout RMSE) and exact-ties the dominant-base+noise-decoy DGP (paired-fold majority gate independently rejects noise bases regardless of the relative threshold => zero regression). Legacy 0.02 kept reachable; replay-safe via getattr fallback (pre-field pickles default to 0.02).
